entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Student get a glimpse of the world beyond English with a poetic biography and then focus on stories and myths created and collected in the 19th century, including Russian fairy tales, short stories from a variety of authors, and Dickens' famous text, A Christmas Carol. 

This topic is included in the following course(s): Literature: Grades 7-8

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Several readings are shared with Grades 5-6, though lesson plans include more advanced work for older students.

rows.label: Lit./Mythology: Grades 7-8
rows.books: The Lightning Dreamer: Cuba's Greatest Abolitionist, A Christmas Carol, The Man Who Invented Christmas directed, Short stories and other writings
